title: Adoption Evidence
outOfScope: Product source and project-specific quality configuration
Template SBOM, provenance, release digest, and other template-owned supply-chain files
Configuration readiness approval and production policy activation

sources.reason: Japanese adoption boundary and evidence claims.
Existing adoption Contract, Summary, and Receipt generation.

riskAssessment.reason: Evidence is local, structured, and explicitly excludes template-owned supply-chain claims and project quality configuration.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized the serial remediation plan and complete Work Item lifecycle.

preReviewWarnings: Review evidence provenance, receipt binding, runtime check results, and explicit not-configured project quality state.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: First adoption writes a structured Runtime Verification record bound to the adopter Contract, Summary, Receipt, and source identity.
Runtime verification records actual executed checks and uses not_run for unavailable project-specific tools; it never treats template evidence as adopter evidence.
The adoption Contract and Summary continue to state that project quality and production readiness require the later Configuration Work Item.
Focused tests cover valid evidence, missing/mismatched binding, forbidden template evidence, and not_run tool results.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.
Adoption evidence must be derived from the adopter repository and must not claim template-owned evidence as adopter evidence.

intent.problem: Adoption creates a Contract, Summary, and Start Receipt, but reviewers need one machine-readable Runtime Verification record that proves what the adopter installation actually checked without overstating readiness.
constraints: Use standard-library JSON and existing receipt bindings.
Record adopter source identity and actual check outcomes; unavailable project tools are not_run.
Reject template SBOM, provenance, release-digest, and template baseline files as adopter evidence.
Do not modify product code or approve project quality configuration.
intent.rationale: A bound runtime record makes adoption evidence auditable and keeps the boundary between template release evidence and adopter-local evidence explicit.

rawUserRequest: 先走完当前文档的流程。用户已授权按计划逐工单执行，包含修改代码、测试、文档、PR、合并、ai-close-work-item、分支清理；妄想测试失败继续修改。

declaredIntent.summary: Generate and validate adopter-local Runtime Verification evidence.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: valid adopter evidence binds Contract, Summary, Receipt, and source identity
mismatched or missing bindings fail closed
unavailable project tools remain not_run and do not become passed

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized governance code, tests, documentation, PR, merge, archive, close, and branch cleanup.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
